items.headline: Private Housing and HDB Are Pulling Apart as Buyer Pools Diverge, NUS Survey Finds
items.summary: A National University of Singapore survey finds that the private condo market and the HDB resale market are increasingly driven by separate groups of buyers with different financial profiles and priorities. The two markets are moving more independently of each other than before.
items.meaning: If you are deciding between a private condo and an HDB flat, do not assume that what is happening in one market tells you anything reliable about the other.

items.headline: Why Berlayar BTO Should Include 5-Room Flats, Even at a Higher Price
items.summary: Business Times makes the case that 5-room HDB flats belong in the upcoming Berlayar BTO project near the Southern Waterfront, arguing demand for larger well-located flats justifies the higher price tag. The piece acknowledges the cost will likely be steeper than for smaller flat types in the same development.
items.meaning: If you want a big flat in a prime location, watch the Berlayar BTO launch closely, but go in with a clear budget as pricing may be above typical BTO levels.

items.headline: New Lentor Condo Offers Park Views, Thomson-East Coast Line Access and Family Amenities
items.summary: The Straits Times previews a new condominium launch in Lentor, noting its park-facing units, direct access to the Thomson-East Coast MRT line, and a neighbourhood with established shops and schools. The piece is aimed at families sizing up the area.
items.meaning: If Lentor is on your shortlist, this gives a clear picture of what the project offers before you visit the showflat.

items.headline: June BTO Results Show Where Singaporeans Are Willing to Compromise and Where They Are Not
items.summary: Stacked Homes analyses June BTO application data to map which towns and flat types drew the fiercest competition and which were more achievable. The patterns reveal strong preferences for certain locations even when the ballot odds are steep.
items.meaning: Before your next BTO application, this breakdown helps you size up the real competition for your preferred project and flat type.

items.headline: Landed Home Sales Have Slowed in 2026, But It Is Still a Sellers' Market
items.summary: Transaction volumes for landed homes have dipped this year, but prices have stayed firm because supply is tight and motivated sellers are rare. Buyers have more time to deliberate but very little room to negotiate on price.
items.meaning: If you are shopping for a landed home, expect sellers to hold firm even if the property sits on the market longer than before.

items.headline: Five of the Cheapest Freehold 3-Bedroom Condos in Singapore, Starting Under $1.7M
items.summary: Stacked Homes rounds up freehold three-bedroom condo units available from below $1.7 million across different parts of Singapore. The list targets buyers who want permanent land tenure without paying luxury prices.
items.meaning: If freehold tenure matters to you and you need at least three bedrooms, this list gives a concrete starting point for what is on the market at that budget.

items.headline: Condo Resale Prices Rebounded in May 2026, Even as Fewer Units Changed Hands
items.summary: Resale condo prices rose in May 2026, reversing a soft patch, even though the number of transactions fell. The split between rising prices and falling volumes suggests sellers are holding firm and buyers are still meeting their asking price.
items.meaning: If you are buying a resale condo, expect sellers to hold or push up asking prices even in a quieter market.

items.headline: 32-Year-Old Executive HDB in Kallang/Whampoa Sets Record at $1.412 Million
items.summary: A 32-year-old executive flat in the Kallang/Whampoa area sold for $1.412 million, a new price record for that flat type in the district. The sale shows the premium buyers will pay for a well-located larger HDB even as the remaining lease shortens.
items.meaning: Prime-area older flats can still fetch record prices, but check the remaining lease carefully before paying top dollar as it affects your loan amount and future resale options.
